ASR Outdoor 18.5 Inch Travel Backpack with Laptop Sleeve School Supplies, Grey

ASR Outdoors new travel backpack is ideal for commuting to work, toting to school, or packing as carry on luggage for air travel and more. Slim profile, lightweight design, top grab handle, classic charcoal color with bright blue modern detailing, this travel backpack also features an interior padded laptop sleeve, along with eight other interior and exterior compartments, to keep belongings organized and easily accessible.

Key Features

  • TRAVEL BACKPACK: Ideal for air travel as carry on luggage, commuting to work or for school, this ASR Outdoor backpack has a slim profile and lightweight design with x9 interior and exterior storage compartments
  • LAPTOP BAG: Perfect for carrying a laptop, the backpack features a padded laptop sleeve to protect against scratches and scuffs, keeping it separate and secure from other personal belongings
  • STORAGE: Even with its slim profile design, this padded laptop backpack features x9 storage compartments, x2 exterior and x7 interior, to keep all belongings organized and easily accessible
  • PADDED LAPTOP BACKPACK: With padded shoulder straps and padded exterior back, as well as a padded interior laptop sleeve, this ASR Outdoor backpack provides ample support to back and shoulders
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18.5 x 12 x 4 inches; Weight: 1.26lbs; Color: Charcoal Exterior, Blue Interior and Detailing; Material: 840D Polyester; Capacity: 15L

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 37395750
  • UPC: 810131705794
  • Color: Gray
  • Size: Large

Perfect if you need to carry a laptop, the interior laptop sleeve is well padded on both sides to protect against scratches and scuffs, keeping it separate and secure from other personal belongings. In addition to this laptop compartment, the travel backpack also comes with two exterior pockets, one small and one large, for items you need to reach quickly and frequently. That leaves seven interior compartments for less frequently needed items, including two pen or pencil slots, allowing for ample room (15L to be exact) for other items.

Importantly, this ASR Outdoor travel, commuter or school backpack also features padded shoulder straps and a padded exterior back wall to provide support to shoulders back and neck, if and when carrying a heavy load. Lastly, we should mention the fabrication of this backpack, made from 840D polyester, making it incredibly durable and able to withstand lots of wear and tear when you’re on the go.

SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18.5 x 12 x 4 inches; Weight: 1.26lbs; Material: 840D Polyester; Capacity: 15L; Care: Hand wash/spot clean recommended
